visual_description: In an office setting, several men in white shirts and ties are seated around a large table, some writing on papers while others look down or at the table; one man stands near the table with arms crossed. The room has glass partitions, visible office equipment, and a television displaying a screen. One man is partially visible in the background, and another is seated with his head bowed, while the standing man faces the seated group.
audio_description: The audio clip begins with a faint, low-frequency hum and a subtle high-frequency hiss, indicating a quiet, acoustically controlled indoor environment. A single male voice, speaking in clear, standard Mandarin Chinese, is heard from a moderate distance, slightly left of center in the stereo field. The speaker’s tone is formal, measured, and somber, with a mid-to-low pitch and deliberate pacing, conveying a sense of gravity and respect. He states, “黄警司是个好警察” (“Inspector Wong is a good police officer”), with each word articulated distinctly and the final syllable of “警察” (police officer) trailing off naturally. The room’s acoustics impart a gentle reverberation, suggesting a large, hard-surfaced space such as a hall or auditorium. Following a brief pause, the speaker continues, “他的葬礼” (“His funeral”), maintaining the same formal and respectful tone. The phrase is delivered with a slight rise in pitch on “他的” (“his”), emphasizing the personal connection, and the final syllable of “葬礼” (funeral) is cut off abruptly, indicating the recording ends mid-word. Throughout, the ambient hum and hiss remain constant, with no other voices, music
